message:
fix(scope_tree): prevent infinite loop in descendants() on cyclic children

The BFS traversal in ScopeTree::descendants() had no visited-node
tracking. When scope_watchdog tests injected cross-references to
create cycles (a→b→a), descendants() looped forever, causing the
entire test suite to hang indefinitely.

Added a HashSet<ScopeId> to track visited nodes, skipping already-seen
children during BFS expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
